title: odontochilus occultus
intro: Odontochilus occultus, also known as the 'Hidden Tooth Orchid', is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Odontochilus occultus is often prepared as a decoction or infusion by steeping the roots or leaves in hot water, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
